questions.question: In data hiding, what does 'Text-Basic features' refer to?
options: C) Text editors with hidden functions
questions.explanation: Text-Basic features are the built-in capabilities of text editors to embed hidden data within plain text.

questions.question: Which of the following is an application of data hiding?
questions.explanation: Data hiding is used in various applications such as image steganography, audio steganography, and text steganography.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of watermarking in data hiding?
options: B) To identify the source of the data
C) To make data more difficult to access
questions.explanation: The primary goal of watermarking is to embed a hidden signature or label in the data, which can be used to identify the source of the data.

questions.question: Which method is considered an intuitive method for data hiding?
questions.explanation: The Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) is an intuitive method for data hiding as it is widely used and can be easily understood by non-experts.

questions.question: What is the main advantage of Simple Digital methods for data hiding?
questions.explanation: Simple Digital methods are preferred for data hiding as they offer low computational complexity, making them efficient and feasible for real-time applications.
